features: An effective cleanser that is gentle on even the most sensitive skin
Perfect for use every day, anytime, anywhere
description: Product Description Beauty Formulas feminine intimate hygiene facial 20 wipes provide a feeling of comfort and freshness throughout the day. A soft and gentle, delicately fragranced wipe impregnated with cleansing, moisturising and antibacterial ingredients to cleanse and freshen your external intimate areas. Provide a feeling of comfort and freshness throughout the day. It is simple Micellar wipes are gentle for everyday use. Suitable for all skin types. Directions To use, gently wipe the sensitive skin area as needed for cleansing. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Keep out of reach of children. Do not flush. See more
